zh.Brecon, Breconshire, Wales: 威爾士布雷康史爾布雷孔

zh.Llanspyddid, Breconshire, Wales: 威爾士布雷康史爾利安斯迪德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Einion "Sais" ap Rhys於1234年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾利安斯迪德時，他的父親Rhys ap Hywel24歲，母親Catrin verch Gruffudd24歲。他於1268年與Eleanor Of England在威爾士格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1279年享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Einion "Sais" ap Rhys于1234年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾利安斯迪德时，他的父亲Rhys ap Hywel24岁，母亲Catrin verch Gruffudd24岁。他于1268年与Eleanor Of England在威尔士格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1279年享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: "Sais"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Fernando, Orlando, Angelita, Arturo, Delfina, Desiderio, Dionicio, Edgardo, Elva, Fidel, Isidoro, Jere.
Catalan: topographic name from saix ‘rock’ (from Latin saxum), or an ethnic name for a Saxon, derived from the root of saxó ‘Saxon’.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Einion "Sais" ap Rhys was born in 1234, in Llanspyddid, Breconshire, Wales, his father, Rhys ap Hywel, was 24 and his mother, Catrin verch Gruffudd, was 24. He married Eleanor Of England in 1268, in Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1279, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Einion "Sais" ap Rhys est né en 1234, à Llanspyddid, Breconshire, Galles, son père, Rhys ap Hywel, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Catrin verch Gruffudd, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Of England en 1268, à Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1279, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Einion "Sais" ap Rhys 1234 in Llanspyddid, Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rhys ap Hywel 24 und seine Mutter Catrin verch Gruffudd 24. Er hat 1268 in Glamorgan, Wales Eleanor Of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1279 im Alter von 45 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Einion "Sais" ap Rhys è nato il nel 1234 nel Llanspyddid, Breconshire, Galles, il suo padre, Rhys ap Hywel, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Catrin verch Gruffudd, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Of England nel 1268, nel Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1279, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Einion "Sais" ap Rhysが1234年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアランスプイッドイドで生まれた時，父Rhys ap Hywelは24歳，母Catrin verch Gruffuddは24歳であった。1268年にウェールズグラモーガンでEleanor Of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1279年に45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Einion "Sais" ap Rhys(이)가 1234년 웨일스 브레콘실르 랜스p이디드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rhys ap Hywel(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Catrin verch Gruffudd(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1268년 웨일스 글램르건에서 Eleanor Of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1279년 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Einion "Sais" ap Rhys nasceu em 1234, em Llanspyddid, Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Rhys ap Hywel, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Catrin verch Gruffudd, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Of England em 1268, em Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1279, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Einion "Sais" ap Rhys родился в 1234 г. в местности лланспиддид, брекуншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Rhys ap Hywel было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Catrin verch Gruffudd, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Of England в 1268 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1279 г. в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Einion "Sais" ap Rhys nació en 1234, en Llanspyddid, Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Rhys ap Hywel, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Catrin verch Gruffudd, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Eleanor Of England en 1268, en Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1279, a la edad de 45 años.
